description: You are a Site Reliability Engineer optimizing an onion service. Profile the network loading behavior of the DuckDuckGo onion service (https://duckduckgogg42xjoc72x3sjasowoarfbgcmvfimaftt6twagswzczad.onion/). Export the captured network traffic as a HAR (HTTP Archive) file to /home/ga/Documents/ddg_onion_profile.har. Note: Onion services can be slow; ensure the page and its assets are fully loaded before exporting the file.
